programme.title: The Blue Realm Ep106: Shark Divers Part 1
programme.desc: Shark divers study, photograph and interact with some of the most terrifying creatures on earth. This group of skilled professionals routinely work with sharks out in the wild and in aquariums. Shark Divers focuses on this diverse and eclectic dive group…each with different motives in their fascinating fields.

programme.title: Hot Water Ep114: Aquabike World Championship Series - Qingdao, China
programme.desc: The UIM ABP Aquabike World Championship is in Qingdao, China, for the Grand Prix of Qingdoa, featuring the Aquabike Jetski Division.

programme.title: World of Watersports Ep311: Surfing The Barrel – Australia (Part 2)
programme.desc: World of Watersports catches up with some of the world's best surfers as they discuss the sport they love and their passion regarding surfing the barrel.

programme.title: Water Matters Ep106: Sustainable Fishing, Ocean Planning
programme.desc: Water Matters documents water-related environmental issues from around the globe as a number of the world’s best documentary filmmakers and environmental organizations share their stories regarding the planet’s water crisis as well as potential solutions for a healthier world.

programme.title: Shark Dive TV Ep104: Tiger Sharks + Night Diving With Sharks + Blacktip Sharks
programme.desc: Shark Dive TV features Tiger Sharks, night diving with Sharks, how shark’s smell, how shark coloration works and introduces us to Blue Sharks.

programme.title: Undone: Female Big-Wave Surfing
programme.desc: Undone is a remarkable story of personal endeavor following female professional surfer, Laura Enever, who leaves a top spot on the WSL Championship Tour to explore the unpredictable world of big-wave surfing. In a life altering change, Laura works to break into the male dominated sport by pursuing some of the most dangerous and remote waves on the planet.

programme.title: The Blue Realm Ep106: Shark Divers Part 1
programme.desc: Shark divers study, photograph and interact with some of the most terrifying creatures on earth. This group of skilled professionals routinely work with sharks out in the wild and in aquariums. Shark Divers focuses on this diverse and eclectic dive group…each with different motives in their fascinating fields.

programme.title: Hot Water Ep114: Aquabike World Championship Series - Qingdao, China
programme.desc: The UIM ABP Aquabike World Championship is in Qingdao, China, for the Grand Prix of Qingdoa, featuring the Aquabike Jetski Division.

programme.title: The Black Crows Presents: Wavy 2
programme.desc: After filming WAVY, director Nikolai Schirmer promised himself that he would never set foot on a ship again. Find out how he ended up off the coast of Svalbard with an excited rookie, a contemptuous captain, and a reformed drug addict, in this thrilling and often comical ski adventure documentary.

programme.title: The Black Crows Presents: La Sentinelle - The Last Frontier
programme.desc: Bruno Compagnet and Camille Jaccoux are friends and co-founders of Black Crows, the iconic ski brand, and La Sentinelle, the renown ski touring event. Two passionate practitioners in conversation, always seeking the wild, beautiful, and natural side of the mountain.

programme.title: Flipside - Resonance - Episode 1 - LAAX
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes with Absinthe Films and the legendary professional snowboarders Nicolas Müller and Wolfgang Nyvelt as they score epic powder at Laax Resort in Switzerland. Nicolas shows the crew around his home terrain, hitting up big hits and dreamy powder fields.

programme.title: Flipside - Resonance - Episode 2 - LAAX
programme.desc: In episode 2 of the Absinthe Films Flipside series, Nicolas Müller and Wolfgang Nyvelt continue exploring Nicolas’ backyard, the Laax Resort in Switzerland. With snow this deep, the mountain is an endless playground.

programme.title: Flipside - Resonance - Episode 3 - LAAX
programme.desc: Snowboarders always have secret stashes. This is especially true for Nicolas Müller. Watch as the Laax local takes Wolle Nyvelt to his favorite spots on the mountain. If you like perfect jumps high above the clouds, powder landings, frontside 1080s, and beautiful sunsets, this episode is for you.

programme.title: Flipside - Resonance - Episode 4 - ARLBERG
programme.desc: In 2012, snowboarder Danny Kass captured his debut part with Absinthe Films. To begin, Kass met up with Eric Jackson in Gigi Rüf’s hometown of Arlberg, Austria. While there, a war broke out between the film crew and the locals. Watch as Gigi steps in to keep the peace.

programme.title: Flipside - Resonance - Episode 5 - ARLBERG
programme.desc: Danny Kass, Gigi Rüf, and Wolle Nyvelt meet up in Arlberg, Austria. The crew spends the day fine-tuning their jump and bagging a perfect bluebird session. Danny puts down his first 720 of the year. Gigi takes a heavy slam trying backside double corks. But wait, there’s more! Drama ensues!

programme.title: Flipside - Resonance - Episode 7 - SAAS FEE
programme.desc: The superhuman Danny Kass and legendary Nicolas Müller reunite with the Absinthe Films crew in Switzerland. From the word “GO!,” the guys score epic powder conditions. Nico goes off slashing. Danny locks down the biggest backflip of his life.

programme.title: Flipside - Resonance - Episode 8 - SAAS FEE
programme.desc: In this episode of Flipside, Danny Kass flips a coin in Saas Fee. Tails he stays in Switzerland. Heads he goes home. Switzerland it is! Now on a solo mission, Kass stacks clips for the cameras of Absinthe Films director Patrick Armbruster. This is Danny Kass at his best.

programme.title: Absinthe Films Presents: Resonance
programme.desc: Resonance stands as a defining Absinthe Films classic, shot across Japan, Switzerland, and Alaska. Featuring Gigi Rüf, Nicolas Müller, Lucas Debari, Danny Kass, Annie Boulanger, Scotty Lago, Bode Merrill, and more in peak form.

programme.title: MICRODOSE Danny Kass - Dose 01
programme.desc: Danny Kass changed snowboarding at a crucial time. Here is how it all began. Starring Danny Kass and the Grenerds.

programme.title: MICRODOSE Danny Kass - Dose 02
programme.desc: Danny Kass changed snowboarding at a crucial time. Here is how it all began. Starring Danny Kass and the Grenerds.

programme.title: MICRODOSE Danny Kass - Dose 03
programme.desc: Danny Kass changed snowboarding at a crucial time. Here is how it all began. Starring Danny Kass and the Grenerds.

programme.title: MICRODOSE Danny Kass - Dose 04

programme.title: MICRODOSE Danny Kass - Dose 05
programme.desc: Danny Kass changed snowboarding at a crucial time. Here is how it all began. Starring Danny Kass and the Grenerds.

programme.title: Atoms and Void - Lay Down Your Weapons
programme.desc: “Lay Down Your Weapons” is a respite from the cacophony of the world. Atoms and Void is musician Arlie Carstens, of Seattle’s Juno, and producer Eric Fisher. Known for his skateboarding films, Director Greg Hunt here lets landscapes and cityscapes slowly unfold. Breathe deeply, watch and listen.

programme.title: Visitations - Smoothie
programme.desc: [object Object]

programme.title: Evo Explores: Kimmy Fasani
programme.desc: Over the course of her career, snowboarder Kimmy Fasani has won the coveted “Women’s Rider of The Year Award” from TransWorld Snowboarding Magazine, and the “Women’s Video Part of The Year Award” from Snowboarder Magazine. This fascinating documentary captures Fasani’s first time riding in Alaska.

programme.title: Evo Explores: Brandon Cocard
programme.desc: An early morning of magic in Haines, Alaska with the Absinthe Films crew. Featuring: Brandon Cocard Kimmy Fasani, Nicolas Müller

programme.title: Echo Chamber
programme.desc: In 2020, Brandon Cocard dropped “Echo Chamber,” featuring cameos from Miles Fallon, Kazu Kokubo, Taylor Elliott, Brendon Rego, Kevin Backstrom, Mike Rav, Kaede Yasunaga, Keisuke Yoshida and Chris Beresford. Filmed in Hokkaido, Japan and Salt Lake City, Utah by Sam Tuor. Music by Cocard and friends.

programme.title: Terje Haakonsen - Nippow Holiday
programme.desc: Snowboarder Terje Haakonsen invites the filmmaker and musician, Leo Cittadella, to join him and Rip Zinger on a powder trip to Hokkaido, Japan. Along the way, they meet up with Nicolas Müller and Mikkel Bang to film for the Absinthe Films feature "TurboDojo.”

programme.title: Terje Haakonsen - Happo One
programme.desc: On his 45th trip to Japan (since 1991), Terje rides powder in the Japanese Alps with the snowboarders Leo Cittadella, Rip Zinger, Curtis Ciszek, Oli Gittler and Ian Tobin.

programme.title: Terje Haakonsen - Happo Two
programme.desc: The snowboarders Rip Zinger and Terje Haakonsen ride powder in Japan. Years after his recovery from a debilitating head injury, they get Kevin Pearce back on snow. Join us for this episode of friendship, freshies, and freeriding.

programme.title: Terje Haakonsen - Happo Three
programme.desc: Snowboarder Terje Haakonsen explores the joys of Japanese mountain culture with his friends Kevin Pearce, Mikkel Bang, Rip Zinger, Oli Gittler, Curtis Ciszek, Leo Cittadella and Ian Tobin.

programme.title: Terje Haakonsen - Relax If You Can
programme.desc: Terje Haakonsen and Leo Cittadella go snowskating at the vast Austrian ski resort of Ischgl. While enjoying a timeout along the Swiss-Austrian border, they discuss European cultural differences and similarities.

programme.title: Terje Haakonsen - Half Banked at Mt Baker
programme.desc: Terje and Leo Cittadella head to Mt. Baker, Washington to meet up with with Russell Winfield and Rip Zinger to compete in the 33rd Legendary Banked Slalom. During a windstorm, a tree falls on the house while everyone is asleep. Terje gets waxing tips from Olympic gold medalist Seth Westcott.

programme.title: Volcom Presents: Attunga - A Higher Place
programme.desc: An intimate portrait of three Norwegian snowboarders: legendary purist Terje Haakonsen, holistic-minded Torgeir Bergrem, and carefree wunderkind Marcus Kleveland. Watch as filmmaker and snowboarder Seth Huot pulls back the curtain to examine their common purpose, potential, pitfalls, and paychecks.

programme.title: Titans of Business
programme.desc: There have been many stories and documentaries on the Bill Gates’, Steve Jobs’ and Henry Fords’ of the world. What about the thousands of other business people, that had a better idea or way to make life better, cheaper, and faster? People who started out from meager beginnings or limited education, to become very wealthy! Many of these people are among us and act no differently than we do, but they have a success story to tell and tricks of success to share. These are the people profiled in “Titans of Business”.

programme.title: Chaiyo Premiere Tour
programme.desc: A skate documentary following a 10-day tour across Thailand, featuring demos and premieres in several cities, capturing the energy of local skate scenes and the passion of skaters coming together to celebrate.

programme.title: Dalua Downhill
programme.desc: This is the journey of Douglas Rodrigues da Silva, aka “Dalua”, who is in search of the Downhill Skateboard world championship. This sport is among the most dangerous in the world where the skaters go downhill reaching speeds over 110 km/h. Over the course of two years, the film follows the Brazilian athlete in his travels around the world revealing that beyond the competition there is a story of determination, passion, pressure and pain. Friendship and rivalry awake some rowdy feelings between the athletes. It is this common bond between them that also what keeps them apart.

programme.title: Speed Catamarans GC32 - Episode 1
programme.desc: The GC32 Racing Tour is back! The World Sailing foiling catamaran circuit has returned as the world recovers from COVID, and both teams and organizers have been keen to return to racing onboard their state-of-the-art flying catamarans. After 18 months of no racing and cancelled events, the anticipation going into the first event in Lagos, Portugal is huge!After a highly competitive, spectacular 2019 season the GC32 foiling cats are back on the racecourse. In 2021, the ultra-high performance one-design catamarans will visit 3 top venues for 4 events, each location selected specially to provide conditions ideal for the nimble GC32s to fly across the water at 30+ knot speeds.So, let’s travel to Lagos, in southern Portugal's Algarve region to witness the first GC32 Racing Tour event for 2021, Lagos Cup 1.

programme.title: Discovering Karpathos - Part 2
programme.desc: We take a stroll down the village of Arkansa, in the middle of Karpathos. The village is loved by tourists who have been coming for over 20 years. Then, we are going to explore some of the ruins of the island, starting in the north in the ancient Vrikous. The island is filled with Ancient Greek ruins we cannot miss on before boarding on a windsurf experience. With the Meltemi wind, Karpathos has become a windsurfing paradise.

programme.title: The Kayak Man
programme.desc: Another expedition? You must be crazy.This is what Beppe's friend told him when he decided to leave for North America. Even after paddling in the biggest rivers in the world, his desire for adventure was still not satisfied, and he went out looking for more. Dreaming of freedom, sleeping bags and nature, he ventured into the unknown to discover the Yukon and Teslin Rivers.For those unaware, the Yukon river is the major watercourse of the northwest of North America. It flows through the Canadian Yukon Territory and makes it's way to Alaska. The Teslin River is a bit shorter, but not for this reason less fun to dive into. They both offer an impressive scenery amidst cold temperatures, dangerous whitewaters and the wild nature of North America.The Kayak Man takes us on a journey of self discovery through the most beautiful landscapes of Canada and the United States while following the path of a brave kayaker that leaves his life behind in an attempt to explore new horizons by himself. An impressive trip that will not leave him the same way he was before.

programme.title: Haunted Boat
programme.desc: HAUNTED BOAT is a mystical, mind-twisting psychological horror film about six teenagers going on a boat trip and getting lost in parallel dimensions where they have to face their greatest fears.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E35 - Prince Charles At 50 Heir To Sadness
programme.desc: After Diana's death, everyone's attention turned to Charles, who was not only a widower and a dad but also next in line for the throne. This show takes a closer look at how he got along with his sons, his longtime love Camilla, and what his future might look like as King. Royal experts David Starkey and Anthony Holden share their insights.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E32 - Prince William Royal Teenage Behind The Scenes
programme.desc: Who's the real person beneath all those glamorous royal photos? This intriguing documentary takes a look into the life of the young man behind the public image.

programme.title: Survive the Wild - S01:E03 - Cunning Copulation
programme.desc: Finding a mate, building a nest, and raising kids are all part of the whole reproductive behavior thing. But it’s not as easy as it sounds. First, you’ve got to sift through lots of possible partners to find the one with the best genes to keep your family line going. Nesting involves finding some space and then guarding it fiercely, while raising the little ones takes loads of energy as you have to feed, teach, and keep them safe until they grow up. This episode dives into the ins and outs of how creatures go about their reproductive business.

programme.title: Wardens - S07:E01 - Three Stories, One Bear
programme.desc: Michigan U.S.A. conservation officers investigate a bear killed during the season's opening weekend; a suspicious bag of trash at a state park; the reason why every successful bear hunter has to turn in a tooth from his kill.

programme.title: Wardens - S07:E02 - Elevated Charges
programme.desc: It's a late night for two Michigan U.S.A. conservation officers as an investigation into a hunting blind on federal property turns into much more. The area is also home to a once nearly extinct bird that is now making a comeback.

programme.title: Close Quarter Battle - S01:E13 - Hunt and Capture Saddam Hussein
programme.desc: Ten years ago, thousands of US and Coalition forces personnel, ranging from elite soldiers to reservists, found themselves in the middle of two conflicts that required an entirely different approach to warfare than they had previously experienced. From special forces units securing vital points of strategic interest and capturing key individuals in Afghanistan. This episode of CQB takes a close look at how special operations were integrated into regular units and how they fought through many close quarter combat situations with a combination of intelligence, high-tech weaponry and surveillance technologies to find and capture Saddam Hussein.

programme.title: Wardens Case Files - S01:E01 - Wardens Worst Nightmare
programme.desc: Wardens: Case Files offers a glimpse into the remarkable stories of seasoned wildlife officers. It will transport viewers into the heart of the action, immersing them in the thrill of the chase and the satisfaction of justice served.

programme.title: Wildlife Heroes - S01:E09 - Bighorn Range
programme.desc: Bighorn sheep are captured and translocated in the mountains of Nevada.

programme.title: Wildlife Heroes - S01:E10 - Preserving A Predator
programme.desc: Conservationists capture and translocate lions across Africa to replenish a once-extinct population.

programme.title: The Grass is Greener Everywhere Else
programme.desc: Either the grass is greener, or the houses are bigger, or the sun is warmer ... anywhere else is better.

programme.title: Junk Space Berlin
programme.desc: Welcome to the marginal deviation of reality. An inexplicable rift runs through the dystopian Berlin and four outsiders venture to find their friend.

programme.title: She Is a Good Boy
programme.desc: When Ava's father Gunter, a classic macho dude, shows up at her door, worlds collide.

programme.title: Forces
programme.desc: Under the crushing emotional burden of his terminally ill father and violent brother, 14-year-old Daniel seeks refuge with two outcasts.

programme.title: Monika
programme.desc: Sensitive coming-of-age drama about the visually impaired Monika (Rosalie Thomass), who is looking for her way to independence.

programme.title: Der Stoff, aus dem Träume sind
programme.desc: Housing is a human right. How can we guarantee housing in the increasingly difficult real estate markets in Europe's major cities?

programme.title: Eye Candy
programme.desc: In the formerly male-dominated world of wrestling, a courageous woman struggles to be taken seriously as an athlete and performer.

programme.title: Not in my Backyard
programme.desc: One of the biggest taboos in society is the rehabilitation of sex offenders. This film takes the offender perspective.

programme.title: A Gun for Jennifer
programme.desc: A woman comes to New York City from Ohio to escape an abusive husband and gets entangled with murderous female vigilantes who prey on abusive men.

programme.title: A Shot In The Dark
programme.desc: A baby is kidnapped in a Brazilian airport. Years later, the mother lives in Lisbon and works in a strip-tease bar so she can survive. When she is fired, she joins a gang of bank robbers...

programme.title: Alice and the Vampire Queen
programme.desc: Alice Oldman is an ex-con struggling to overcome the scars from her past. Then one night a dark stranger gives her an offer she cannot refuse. Make one special dish for his boss, the Vampire Queen.

programme.title: Alien Rising
programme.desc: A savvy ex-homeland security agent and martial arts expert is forced to a remote island to help the military unlock the secrets of an extraterrestrial technology.

programme.title: A Dream Called Death
programme.desc: An introvert and Schizophrenic young man finds the "Perfect Cure" to his mental illness in the form of a damsel whom he considers to be the "Woman of his dream," but his dream somewhat turns out to be a nightmare for him and everyone around him!

programme.title: A Tiger in Winter
programme.desc: On a winter day, when a tiger escapes from the zoo, a man is kicked out of his girlfriend's house. Having no place to go, he wanders from here to there while working as a substitute driver and meets his old girlfriend.

programme.title: Adam and Evelyn
programme.desc: Summer 1989, East Germany. Adam works as a tailor, Evelyn as a waitress. They are planning a vacation together when Evelyn finds out that Adam is cheating on her and decides to leave for the holiday on her own.

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: Change in the space industry is accelerating.

programme.desc: Advances In Space Exploration

programme.desc: From Dream To Reality looks back at the people and the technology of the Apollo era.

programme.title: Mani
programme.desc: Dylan, Goth Girl, Hank, and Paige compete to win the Jitterbug empire.

programme.title: Mani
programme.desc: Mani is back! The girls deal with boy drama, while Mani confronts his own theatrics.

programme.title: Mani
programme.desc: Tensions between Sky and Harmony boil over onstage as the school play concludes.

programme.title: Stage Fright
programme.desc: Will Lizzy and Co. be able to unmask the culprit, or will it be curtains for the theater department?

programme.title: Stage Fright
programme.desc: It's dress rehearsal for the Crown Lake drama club, and one student becomes the victim of a tragic accident.

programme.title: Crown Lake
programme.desc: Nellie and Josh hit it off until she learns about long-standing and controversial rule during Treasure Hunt.

programme.title: Crown Lake
programme.desc: After the Scavenger Hunt debacle, Nellie returns to Crown Lake with a vengeance.

programme.title: Total Eclipse
programme.desc: Embarrassed by an old photo, Diana vows to get revenge at her big party.

programme.title: Total Eclipse
programme.desc: When Kate casts a love spell, the girls’ relationships start to change.

programme.title: Chicken Girls
programme.desc: Harmony helps Rhyme make up her mind, and Flash goes out for the team.

programme.title: Cabin of Errors
programme.desc: When Peter and Nancy split up, their friends plot to bring them back together during a trip to a cabin. But things go hilariously wrong when Peter comes to the cabin with other intentions. A modern day romantic comedy farce.

programme.title: Cabin of Errors
programme.desc: When Peter and Nancy split up, their friends plot to bring them back together during a trip to a cabin. But things go hilariously wrong when Peter comes to the cabin with other intentions. A modern day romantic comedy farce.

programme.title: The Malibu Beach Vampires
programme.desc: In addition to the traditional bloodsuckers, there are other kinds of vampires, you know...such as some politicians, military people, and evangelists.

programme.title: 1st Bite
programme.desc: Set on a tropical island in Thailand, the strange plight of a beleaguered chef who, while romancing a mysterious woman, discovers the diabolical Zen of cooking. Following a near death escape, he returns to Montreal and falls hard for the woman of his life who unfortunately craves only his cooking but not his loving. Worse still, strange things surfacing around him indicate that his journey to the Far East has deep, divine implications. The stage is set for him to take the 1st bite of true love and end the cycle of suffering for all involved.

programme.title: Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Did the late Stanley Meyer figure out a way to run an internal combustion engine on pure water?

programme.title: Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Cryptozoologists who believe pterodactyls, flying dinosaurs extinct some 60 million years ago, are alive and thriving in remote places such as Papua New Guinea.

programme.title: Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: What's going on inside Area 51, America's most carefully guarded secret?

programme.title: Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Is there a conspiracy afoot to drastically reduce the world's population?

programme.title: Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Agenda 21 is a non-binding voluntarily implemented action plan of the United Nations with regard to sustainable development.

programme.title: Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: On March 13th 1997, an extraordinary event occurred across the state of Arizona that has become the subject of great debate in the UFO community.

programme.title: Thirty the Series
programme.desc: While Anna's love life heats up, Dalia and John struggle in and out of the bedroom, and Charlie fights her own secret battle.

programme.title: Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Is Human use of carbon-based fossil fuels will lead to catastrophic global warming or climate change a hoax.

programme.title: Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: The Conspiracy Show travels to New York, LA and Toronto in order to investigate the murder of John Lennon.

programme.title: Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Did this pop icon and blond bombshell succumb to a drug overdose in 1962 as we've been led to believe or was she killed for 'knowing too much?"

programme.title: Unicorn Hunters
programme.desc: Far UV creates autonomous disinfection devices that can assist in containing the inevitable emergence of infectious diseases that can be spread by pathogens on surfaces or through the air. It is under contract with NASA to prevent foodborne illness in space flight and works with the US Army.

programme.title: Alien Rising
programme.desc: A savvy ex-homeland security agent and martial arts expert is forced to a remote island to help the military unlock the secrets of an extraterrestrial technology.

programme.title: Anonymous
programme.desc: Artemis and Cash set out to take down a child sex trafficking ring and, in doing so discover Artemis' long lost son, only to find there are grave consequences that may cost them their lives and the ones they love. Unbeknownst to Artemis, the hard core enforcer, Olivier (Ernest L. Thomas -What's Happening, Malcolm X, Everybody Hates Chris) is also searching for the boy and willing to do anything to find him.

programme.title: Beyond the Night
programme.desc: When a soldier's son reveals damning information about a local gangster's missing daughter, a war of attrition wreaks havoc on their forgotten coal mining town.

programme.title: Beyond
programme.desc: Two brothers runs the neighborhood gang, tries to hide their true identities from their mom by pretending to have a day job, but faces a deeper problems when the ruthless mafia boss asks them to do a job for them. The simple job turns into protecting their homeland against neighboring country's mafia to use their land to expand their dirty business.

programme.title: Hell's Angels
programme.desc: Two British brothers fly in WWI’s fiercest battles, face betrayal over a lover, and sacrifice everything amid sky-high spectacle and tragedy.

programme.title: The Man with the Golden Arm
programme.desc: A recovering heroin addict tries to rebuild his life as a jazz drummer, but crime, manipulation, and temptation threaten to pull him back into his dark past.

programme.title: Flight
programme.desc: A Marine rookie and his mentor vie for a nurse’s love, battling together in the air and on Nicaraguan battlefields.

programme.title: Long John Silver's Return to Treasure Island
programme.desc: Long John Silver rescues his friend Jim from rival pirates and risks all for hidden treasure in this colorful swashbuckling sequel.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes Dressed to Kill
programme.desc: Sherlock Holmes sets out to discover why a trio of murderous villains, including a dangerously attractive female, are desperate to obtain three unassuming and inexpensive little music boxes

programme.title: The Terror
programme.desc: A group of medical students undertake some silly and frightening endeavors in order to pledge a fraternity

programme.title: The Red House
programme.desc: An old man and his sister are concealing a terrible secret from their adopted teen daughter, concerning a hidden abandoned farmhouse, located deep in the woods

programme.title: A Farewell to Arms
programme.desc: An English nurse and an American soldier on the Italian front during World War I fall in love, but the horrors surrounding them test their romance to the limit

programme.title: Not As Long As My Song!
programme.desc: Hitting your limit isn’t a sign of weakness; it’s an invitation to shift your perspective. When the enemy brings the battle to your mind, remember that he only attacks what’s valuable. And God’s goodness is your secret weapon to win the fight.

programme.title: God Wants To Show You
programme.desc: God wants to show you what’s next, but He’s waiting on you. If you want to see God’s point of view, start by slowing down and going His speed. Breakthrough happens when you let go and allow God to show you the way.

programme.title: Hand Him The Plan
programme.desc: Sometimes the battle in your mind is proof that God’s trying to do something great in your heart. What you see isn’t the full picture of what God has for you. When you hand God your plans, you make room for His purpose.

programme.title: Sinking In The Storm
programme.desc: When you feel like you’re starting to sink in the storm, call on the name of Jesus. He’s near, and He won’t let you go down. Don’t panic and obsess over the problem, because when you sync up with Jesus, things can change just that quick.

programme.title: Delivered Daily
programme.desc: “God, can You get me out of this?” It’s a prayer we’ve all prayed. But what if God’s answer isn’t escape, but endurance? What if His rescue comes one day at a time? This message will help you recognize God’s faithful provision in every season and learn how to trust His hand as He leads you through.

programme.title: Same Lies New Loops
programme.desc: The enemy loves to trap you in the same old lies: “It’s not enough” and “You’re not loved.” But God’s truth breaks the cycle. When you change what you say, you change what you see, and His presence opens a new loop of peace and hope.

programme.title: He Answered
programme.desc: Pastor Steven gives us three things to remember when life is hard. The enemy wants to keep us circling the wilderness, but God will bring us through as we learn to repeat what leads us to victory.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Fausto and Ezequiel confront each other; the video that projects Celso's death will sink Fausto unless he signs a confession where he clarifies that Rosa Blanco was unjustly condemned. Fausto manipulates saying that Ezequiel also confesses that he killed his brother Augusto, Camila's father. She arrives in time to stop Ezequiel from shooting Fausto.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Fausto, narrates in detail what happened years ago. He lies blatantly, Torrealba thinks he wants to blame his wife for having been unfaithful to him. Camila reproaches Mother Isabel harshly. Rosa cannot appear because they want to kill her. Axel, disappointed because Amelia hid the paternity of his son from him.

programme.title: La Trepadora
programme.desc: Convinced that Fernanda is behind the death of the late Rosendo's horse, Hilario warns Florencia that her half-sister plans to involve her in her traps; Hilario is sure that someone else is receiving money from Fernanda to frame Victoria in General's death. Federico tries to impose himself in Los Samanes and go over Nicolás' orders, he makes it clear to him that he is just another pawn within the hacienda. Florencia unburdens herself with Fernanda, because she knows that Nicolás would not leave her for Victoria but because he does not really love her; however, Nicolás contacts his aunt to let her know that he will look for Florencia. Moncho notifies Hilario of his resignation as foreman of Cantarrana. Sergio receives a visit from Victoria, who has changed her mind, because although she does not want to hurt Sergio, she is determined to forget Nicolás del Casal for good.

programme.title: La Trepadora
programme.desc: Committed to forget Nicolás Del Casal, Victoria decides to reciprocate the love Sergio offers her, although Sergio believes that the young Guanipa is not yet ready to fall in love again. Florencia wants to make sure that Nicolás did not believe Victoria when she claimed to have been a victim of the late Rosendo Zapata, who in life wanted to abuse her. Hilario is overcome with sadness as he wanders through the nooks and crannies of the Cantarrana hacienda, where he remembers being a man that everyone respected and of whom now only the remains are left. At nightfall, Fernanda leans on Leopoldo to impose a punishment on his daughter Eugenia for having lied to him; Eugenia tries to manipulate her father, as she begs him to let her leave, but the young Alcoy is forced to stay at home. Nicolás is approached by his wife, who wants to attend an event that Nicolás refuses to go to, but suddenly changes his mind when he learns that the event is none other than the same art auction to which Sergio invited Victoria.

programme.title: Corazon Traicionado
programme.desc: Guillermo tells Lorena that if she does not kill Marco Aurelio Corona, she will never see her son again. Lorena returns to Lucas and informs him that she was unable to kill him. As fate would have it, Lorena and Alberto meet again. Alberto is shocked to recognize Lorena and wonders how she ended up being his father's personal nurse.

programme.title: Corazon Traicionado
programme.desc: Claudio gives instructions to Pedro about the new plan to kill his brother. In an attempt to recover the million dollars that a third party collected with the stolen check, Ricardo and Paulina go before the bank manager who confirms that the operation was clean and cannot be reversed. Lorena receives a package from her husband.

programme.title: El Desprecio
programme.desc: To Pastora and Edilio's displeasure, Cirilo accepts Israel's offer, they will manage the Santa Maria's empire together.

programme.title: DRIVING
programme.desc: Programa dinámico y emocionante dedicado a los amantes de los deportes, el automovilismo, el motociclismo y la aventura.

programme.title: AQUÍ ESTOY
programme.desc: Programa que conecta al público con temas de actualidad global , ofreciendo una visión informada de la "Aldea Global."

programme.title: FUERZA LATINA
programme.desc: Programa que conecta al público con temas de actualidad global , ofreciendo una visión informada de la "Aldea Global."

programme.desc: Programa periodístico que presenta entrevistas exclusivas y análisis de temas actuales, manteniendo al público informado al momento.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Ante una llamada telefónica de Rosa Blanco a Luciano, Camila, ilusionada, quiere hablar con su mamá. El Capitán Torrealba la ayude a entender los secretos que existen sobre el crimen. Ante la brutal agresión a Sebastián, Ezequiel quiere vengarla con Fernando, un Aragón.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Patricia y María Amelia habían denunciado el crimen de la muerte de Leoncio. Torrealba las enfrenta pues quiere saber cómo fue que Rosa mató a Leoncio. Patricia, desesperada, bebe sin freno. Ante su descontrol, el detective, capcioso, duda de ella.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: En las cartas que entregó Henry a Max, Rosa Blanco dice que le arrebataron a su hija y Camila, muy ansiosa, cree que, al fin sabrá por qué su mamá la abandonó. Marcelina encuentra la caja con las cartas y al saber el contenido, alterada, ordena que las quemen.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: En la cena, el tema principal será Rosa Blanco. Ezequiel dice que esa mujer fue una oportunista que enamoró y se aprovechó de su hermano menor, Leoncio. Astrid ofende agregando que fue una prostituta, culpable de la guerra entre las dos familias por su relación con Augusto Aragón y también con Leoncio López.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Camila insiste en saber sobre su relación familiar, piensa que pueda ser prima de Max. Ezequiel quiere despejar la duda de que podría ser su sobrina, interroga a la Madre Isabel que niega saberlo y también recurre a Marcelina que se lo confirma. Camila, protege a Chantal, una niña que vende flores.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Max y Camila en idílicos momentos sin importar ní el resultado del A.D.N. Continúan en la búsqueda de Rosa Blanco. Dos encomiendas entregadas por un mensajero, una para los López Méndez y otra para los Aragón, confirman la reaparición de El Doliente.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Al llegar a la casa de El Jagüey, Madre Isabel no los deja entrar, conocen a Henry y presumen que también pueda ser hijo de Rosa Blanco. Max piensa que algo grave

programme.title: El Retorno
programme.desc: Una extraña mujer mantiene expectante y desorientado al espectador cuando a diario habla con su hija y la presencia de su hija no aparece en ningún momento.

programme.title: 48 Horas de Terror
programme.desc: Mateo un escritor citadino adquiere una casa de campo en donde planea vivir con su esposa y escribir en la tranquilidad del campo, pero no tomo en cuenta las trágicas noticias de los acontecimientos de canibalismo que ocurrieron a manos de sus vecinos quienes solo buscan sacias su hambre.

programme.title: The Juniors y La Formula Imperial
programme.desc: Narra las vidas de 7 adolescentes millonarios que se aventuran a planificar una revolución social, generada por vídeo-escándalos y experimentos médicos, con el objetivo de generar un cambio en la ideología mundial, el conflicto entre las clases sociales y el enfrentamiento con sus muchachas de servicio doméstico.

programme.title: El Cóndor En Nueva York
programme.desc: Un narcotraficante de Nueva York, llamado Damián, ha creado una nueva droga con efectos impactantes. Después de varias muertes accidentales, la DEA y la policía se embarcan en una búsqueda inútil en busca de este jefe de la mafia. Damián comienza a derrotar a su competencia con la ayuda de su científico privado y un informante de la DEA. El hijo del alcalde Martínez (de Súper Cóndor) queda en coma tras consumir el nuevo medicamento. El alcalde Martínez vuela a Nueva York desde Perú para comenzar su propia investigación en busca de Damián y una cura. Todo parece sombrío para los agentes de la DEA, el alcalde Martínez y su hijo; hasta que llegue la ayuda. El Cóndor llega a Nueva York desde Perú para ayudar a revertir los efectos de esta nueva y brutal droga y llevar a Damián ante la justicia.

programme.title: Esposa de Vacaciones
programme.desc: Aprovechando la ausencia de su esposa, un hombre se sumerge en las tentaciones que ofrece el ciber espacio y conoce a una mujer casada. Ellos vivirán un romance idílico sin dimensionar las consecuencias.

programme.title: Aute Retrato
programme.desc: Recopilación de los mejores momentos de Luis Eduardo Aute en sus 50 años de carrera musical y artística. Un recorrido por sus distintas facetas creativas y sus bandas sonoras. Toda la vida el artista desvelada por un grupo de testigos, colaboradores y amigos que, a través de sus testimonios, demuestran el impacto que han tenido sus icónicas canciones sobre la actualidad musical.

programme.title: Al Acecho del Leopardo AKA Madrid- México
programme.desc: Durante un viaje por la selva mexicana, tres amigos, Román, Patricia y Lorena son testigos de una matanza de campesinos indígenas. Román graba en vídeo la masacre. El Suavecito, el jefe de los asesinos, se da cuenta y mata a Román y a Patricia. Aprovechando la confusión del tiroteo, Lorena logra escapar con la cámara y el vídeo. En su huida se encuentra con un grupo de enanitos toreros que la llevan hasta la ciudad de México. El Suavecito, que no quiere dejar testigos, la persigue implacablemente hasta una enorme plaza de toros, donde en una danza de la muerte, se escenificará la batalla entre el bien y el mal.

programme.title: The Man with the Golden Arm
programme.desc: Un exadicto a la heroína intenta reconstruir su vida como baterista de jazz, pero el crimen, la manipulación y la tentación amenazan con arrastrarlo de nuevo a su oscuro pasado.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes and The Secret Weapon
programme.desc: Holmes debe burlar a espías nazis y a Moriarty para salvar a un inventor de miras de bombardeo.

programme.title: The Amazing Mr. X
programme.desc: Una viuda en duelo es seducida por un espiritista que afirma poder contactar a su difunto esposo, pero nada es lo que parece.

programme.title: A Bucket of Blood
programme.desc: Un camarero de un café beatnik se convierte en un artista asesino para alimentar su nueva fama.

programme.title: Abilene Town
programme.desc: Un sheriff intenta detener los conflictos entre colonos en el Oeste tras la Guerra Civil.
